Based on their chemical nature, the fatty acids are broadly grouped as saturated (SFA ), monounsaturated (MUFA) and polyunsaturated (PUFA). There are several fatty acids in each group. Fats from coconut oil, vanaspati , animal fats (ghee and butter) and animal foods like milk, milk products and meat provide saturated fatty acids.
